job_title: Analyst, Commerce - CNN Data Analytics, Science & Insights
strengths: Strong SQL and advanced Excel skills
Hands-on with BI tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker)
Experience building ETL/ELT pipelines and automation
weaknesses: R listed but limited demonstrated analytics projects in R
No explicit statistics hypothesis testing detail
improvement_bullets: Developed and maintained Looker and Power BI dashboards to track affiliate commerce conversion metrics, proactively alerting stakeholders to shifts in user acquisition behavior.
Designed rigorous A/B testing and experimental design frameworks, applying hypothesis testing and statistical significance analysis to optimize digital marketing and commerce content performance.
Integrated Salesforce CRM and disparate web traffic datasets to conduct deep-dive exploratory analysis on customer lifetime value and commerce-driven engagement patterns.

Collaborated with cross-functional teams to translate complex statistical concepts—including probability distributions and correlation—into actionable business recommendations for commerce initiatives.
Standardized data quality protocols across ingestion pipelines to ensure the reliability of affiliate commerce analytics, supporting scalable decision-making for digital media content.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Analyst, Commerce - CNN Data Analytics, Science & Insights opportunity with CNN. I am interested in this opportunity because of CNN’s unique position at the intersection of world-class journalism and the rapidly evolving digital commerce landscape. What interests me about working for CNN is its reputation for data-driven storytelling and the commitment to delivering essential news in a digital-first ecosystem. I believe my expertise in building robust data pipelines and my proficiency in advanced statistical analysis would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on the 'single source of truth' for business stakeholders. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a need for better tracking and built a series of automated reports and models that segmented high-value customers. This project resulted in a 300% increase in revenue for that segment over 12 months, showcasing my ability to turn raw data into bottom-line growth. Ultimately, I know that the Analyst, Commerce role at CNN would allow me to bring my experience in conversion optimization to support the growth of CNN’s digital products. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my A/B testing and experimental design skills. I designed and executed controlled tests on digital campaigns, applying hypothesis testing to measure audience response and lift, which provided the statistical evidence needed to optimize our marketing spend. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and SQL to work on conversion initiatives at CNN. I know that my analytical rigor and proactive approach to problem-solving align with what it takes to succeed at the Analyst, Commerce role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
